Open

Give feedback

To get a quote for a new garage door in the East Bay, the fastest approach is usually:

  1. Take a few photos of your current garage door (inside and outside).

  2. Measure the door opening (width × height).

  3. Decide whether you want:

 * Steel, wood, aluminum, or glass

 * Insulated vs. non-insulated

 * New opener included or door only

  4. Request at least 3 quotes from local installers.

  5. Ask for an itemized estimate showing door cost, installation, disposal of the old door, opener cost, permits (if applicable), and warranty.

Some East Bay companies that offer free estimates include:

  * Door Pros — Offers free estimates and a range of residential garage door options. [Residential & Commercial Garage Door Services - Door Pros](https://www.doorpros.com/garage-door-services/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Precision Garage Door of East Bay — Provides free in-person new-door estimates and online design tools. [Precision Garage Door East Bay | Repair, Openers & New Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * East Bay Garage Door Repair Pros — Offers free quotes for installations and replacements. [East Bay Garage Door Repair | Same-Day Service](https://eastbaygaragedoorrepair.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * R&S Overhead Garage Door, Inc. — Long-established East Bay installer serving residential and commercial customers. [Expert Garage Door Company in San Leandro, CA | R&S Overhead](https://rsdoors.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Integrity Garage Doors & Gates — Provides free estimates and serves much of the Bay Area. [Bay Area Garage Door Service Areas | Integrity GD](https://integritygd.com/locations/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

A useful tip from local homeowners is to get multiple bids and compare itemized quotes rather than choosing based on the headline price alone. Some Reddit discussions also emphasize verifying that contractors are licensed and asking exactly what is included in the estimate. [Garage door repair](https://www.reddit.com/r/eastbay/comments/1orgp3x/garage_door_repair/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you'd like, tell me:

  * Your city (Oakland, Berkeley, Walnut Creek, Fremont, etc.)

  * Single-car or double-car door

  * Whether you want insulation

and I can help estimate a realistic price range and suggest the best door styles for your home.
